_comment: Example shape produced by: python3 -m harnessloop init-claude-code. Replace placeholder fingerprints with real lines from ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md and ~/.claude/projects/*/memory/MEMORY.md.
_note_config_block: Use scope=config_block for Claude Code loaded-context files. Set config_block_needle to a distinctive header emitted near Claude Code's loaded instructions if you have one; otherwise leave null and verify the fallback against captures.
_note_hooks: Hooks fire client-side and are not inherently visible in model requests. Do not assert raw hook config here; prefer canary side-effect checks or a hook-injected distinctive line that should be visible in the request.

mechanisms.gloss: global Claude Code CLAUDE.md reached the model
project Claude Code memory reached the model

rules.gloss: global CLAUDE.md is compiled into every main request
project MEMORY.md is compiled into every main request
